title: Figure 5 from: Sun Q, Li J, Syed S, Li X, Yuan H, Lian B (2024) Roles of oxalate-degrading bacteria in fungus-growing termite nests. Biodiversity Data Journal 12: e130041. https://doi.org/10.3897/BDJ.12.e130041
author: Sun, Qibiao
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 5 Gene copies of frc and 16S rRNA in soil samples determined by quantitative PCR. Values are means (± standard deviations) of nine individual samples. The letters on the error line represent significant differences, identified by Duncan's post hoc test at p < 0.05.
steps_raw: Figure 5 Gene copies of frc and 16S rRNA in soil samples determined by quantitative PCR. Values are means (± standard deviations) of nine individual samples. The letters on the error line represent significant differences, identified by Duncan's post hoc test at p < 0.05.
